headline: Dutch Bros Stock Jumps 25% in a Month: Buy the Rally or Wait?

headline: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
summary: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

raw.headline: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
raw.summary: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

headline: KFC has fallen behind its competitors. Here’s its latest plan to catch up.
summary: KFC is unveiling fresh upgrades to its menu, stores and branding to keep up with other fast-food chicken competitors. Its domestic market, the U.S., has slipped to its third largest, as other chains like Chick-fil-A, Popeyes, and Raising Cane's have become some of the industry’s most popular overall. CNBC’s Amelia Lucas has the details on how KFC plans to regain market share in the U.S. and innovate globally.
